title: Wrova Unbreakable Plastic Plates 10 Inch Set of 8 Unbreakable Dinner Plate for Kitchen, Deep Dinner Plates - Dishwasher & Microwave Safe Plate, Reusable Lightweight Plates Sets(Vivid Mix)
features: 【Unbreakable & Lightweight】- Wrova plastic plates *8 are unbreakable and practical. Wrova lightweight plates set are constructed with food-grade PP, BPA free and reusable. Lightweight and Stack-able are other advantages,they really suitable for kitchen and camping.

【Dishwasher & Microwave Safe】- Wrova reusable dinner plates for kitchen are Microwave safe and Dishwasher safe, temperature resistance ranges from -4°F to 248°F. Also available for Freezer. Easy to clean and store,our large plates make your life more convenient.

【An Ideal Reusable Plates Option】- This reusable dinner plate is an alternative to disposable dinnerware and can be used over and over again. Sturdy in daily use, this unbreakable plate shrugs off drops and bumps.

【ReusabLe Plates & DelightfuL Color】- Colorful series of plastic plates set of 8 have 4 different colors. Each color shows different happiness of our life. In addition, you can also enjoy the fun of using colorful serving plates at parties/dinners/lunch.

【Versatile】- Wrova melamine plates are lightweight, suitable for every meal, serving sandwich, bread and butter, dessert, salad, appetizer, etc. Whether indoor or out door, our large dinner plates will show their excellent quality.

【Your Smile,Our Mission】- Wrova plastic plates are also suitable for gifting.Wrova is confident in its product and wants nothing more than the buyer's satisfaction.If you're not satisfied with our plastic plate. We're here to help.
description: Product Description Wrova Reusable Plates Set 10 INCH REUSABLE PLATES Reliable Material : Made of grain food-grade pp material.Non-toxic BPA free, Reusable. Lightweight Plates : While maintaining size, each plastic plate weighs only 2.8 ounces, making it very light and suitable for picnics. Unbreakable plates : Unlike traditional porcelain and metal plates, these plates will neither shatter nor deform after an accidental drop.
